createapp_description: Describe the app you want in the chat, and AI will help you build it.
createapp_subtitle: Describe your idea, AI brings it to life
createapp_tpl_competitor_desc: Build an AI competitor analysis tool — enter a product name or URL and get a full comparison report with strengths, weaknesses and positioning
createapp_tpl_copywriter_desc: Build an AI copywriting tool — enter product highlights and generate marketing copy for social media, ads and product pages in one click
createapp_tpl_proposal_desc: Build an AI business proposal tool — enter project background and requirements, get a complete proposal document auto-generated
createapp_tpl_interview_desc: Build an AI mock interviewer — pick a role and company type, get professional interview questions with improvement feedback
createapp_tpl_mindmap_desc: Build an AI mind map generator — enter a topic and get a visual mind map auto-expanded by AI
createapp_tpl_persona_desc: Build an AI role-play app where you can chat freely with historical figures or fictional characters
createapp_tpl_password_desc: Build a random password generator with length and character options
createapp_tpl_color_desc: Build a color palette generator — enter a keyword or mood and get a harmonious color scheme
createapp_tpl_regex_desc: Build a regex debugger with real-time match highlighting and common pattern templates
createapp_tpl_snake_desc: Build a classic snake game with arrow key controls
createapp_tpl_memory_desc: Build a card matching memory game with emoji patterns
createapp_tpl_adventure_desc: Build an AI text adventure game where AI generates the story in real-time based on your choices
createapp_tpl_recipe_desc: Build a recipe app that suggests dishes based on ingredients
createapp_tpl_countdown_desc: Create a countdown app with multiple event cards, target dates, remaining time, progress bars, reminder copy, and categories for birthdays, travel, exams, and deadlines.
createapp_tpl_inventory_desc: Create an inventory management app with products, categories, SKUs, inbound and outbound stock, current quantity, low-stock alerts, supplier info, and searchable tables for efficient daily operations.
createapp_tpl_quote_desc: Create a quotation app that captures client info, project name, line items, quantities, tax rate, notes, and validity period, then calculates totals and produces a clean commercial quote.
createapp_tpl_crm_desc: Create a customer follow-up app with profiles, lead source, pipeline stage, owner, next contact time, follow-up notes, and deal status for sales and consulting workflows.
createapp_tpl_calendar_desc: Create a planning calendar with day, week, and month views, plus priorities, color tags, reminders, completion states, and quick add/edit interactions that feel light and efficient.
createapp_tpl_board_desc: Create a project board with To Do, In Progress, and Done columns, card drag-and-drop, owners, due dates, tags, and a task detail panel for personal or small-team project tracking.
createapp_tpl_pomodoro_desc: Create a Pomodoro app with focus sessions, short and long breaks, today stats, total duration, focus records, and reminder states in a calm, restrained interface suited for long-term use.
